speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Food you have
questions: What fruit do you have at home?
How many eggs do you usually buy?
Do you eat a lot of vegetables?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I have some apples and bananas at home. I usually buy six eggs a week. Yes, I eat a lot of vegetables.

speaking.title: Speaking Part 1: Drinks and food at home
questions: How much water do you drink every day?
Do you have much rice at home?
How much sugar do you use in your tea?
speaking.sampleAnswer: I drink a lot of water every day. Yes, I have some rice at home. I use a little sugar in my tea.
